description: You are a museum curator preparing a 'History of Computing' exhibit. Generate QR codes for three Wikipedia articles: ENIAC (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ENIAC), Grace Hopper (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Grace_Hopper), and Transistor (https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Transistor). Save the QR code images to ~/Desktop/eniac_qr.png, ~/Desktop/hopper_qr.png, and ~/Desktop/transistor_qr.png respectively. Create a manifest file at ~/Desktop/qr_manifest.txt listing each filename and its corresponding URL.
